name: prodef-meta-model
description: Minimal implementation of the Prodef meta-model for combinatorial optimization.

scripts.start: cd prodef-runtime-rust && cargo build --release && cd .. && concurrently "npm --prefix ui run serve" "npm --prefix ui run dev"
scripts.docs:ui: cd ui && npx typedoc --options typedoc.json && start ./docs/ui/index.html
